tasks.label: 1. Compile C++ and OBS Plugin (CMake MSVC)
2. Package DLL & EXE to ZIP
args: if (Test-Path 'camext_plugin.zip') { Remove-Item 'camext_plugin.zip' -Force }; if (Test-Path 'package') { Remove-Item 'package' -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'package/obs-plugins/64bit' | Out-Null; if (Test-Path 'build/Release/camext.dll') { Copy-Item 'build/Release/camext.dll' 'package/obs-plugins/64bit/' }; if (Test-Path 'build/Release/camext_receiver.exe') { Copy-Item 'build/Release/camext_receiver.exe' 'package/obs-plugins/64bit/' }; if (Test-Path 'package/obs-plugins/64bit/*') { Compress-Archive -Path 'package/obs-plugins' -DestinationPath 'camext_plugin.zip' -Force; Write-Host '[+] Sukses! File ZIP terstruktur berhasil dibuat di camext_plugin.zip. Tinggal ekstrak isinya langsung ke folder instalasi OBS Studio.' } else { Write-Error '[!] Gagal menemukan file hasil kompilasi untuk dikemas!' }; if (Test-Path 'package') { Remove-Item 'package' -Recurse -Force }

tasks.label: Auto Build OBS Plugin & Standalone (MSVC ZIP)
dependsOn: 1. Compile C++ and OBS Plugin (CMake MSVC)
